## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss HeyGen's SEO and content strategy progress, challenges, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance improving: articles taking 1.5-3 months to gain traction](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Personalized video use case focus for April-May (B2B, ABM, sales outreach)](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [CMS migration from Webflow to Sanity in progress, causing some publishing issues](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Redirect needed for defake tool page to face swap video tool page](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Record impressions last week, clicks following closely](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Gap between impressions and clicks decreasing](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Articles take 1.5-3 months to start performing well](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Example: 3-week-old article already performing strongly](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
  - [Deep fake and face swap tool pages excluded to analyze other tools' performance](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)

### Content Strategy and Development

  - [Mixing keywords for API and video creation](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [10 good keywords identified for upcoming content](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [\~140 blog posts in pipeline, 34 use case-related posts ready](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Focus on personalized video use cases for April-May](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [B2B-focused keywords showing different volume patterns than general audience keywords](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)

### Technical Challenges and CMS Migration

  - [Validation issues preventing new tool page publications](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [CMS migration from Webflow to Sanity ongoing (expected completion: yesterday)](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Nav Singh designated as point of contact for technical issues](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Redirect process for Sanity CMS needs clarification](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)

### Personalized Video Use Cases

  - [Key focus: ABM campaigns, sales outreach, customer thank-yous, event follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Limited internal data on effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [External benchmark: Nutanix LinkedIn post](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Case study: 1.3-3x engagement for personalized vs. non-personalized videos (Anheuser-Busch, 50,000+ videos)](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)

### Ethical AI Usage

  - [Reviewing UGC, face swap, and deep fake articles](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Adding tips for ethical AI video use](https://fathom.video/share/WLCcmDJ7CfUA5utVecxRrHNk9bTVkuJz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
